competitors.name: ts-go-run-types
zod
competitors.source: c(z.union([z.object({id: z.string()}), z.object({id: z.string(), name: z.string()}), z.object({value: z.number().finite()})]))

competitors.name: typebox
competitors.source:
c(
    Type.Union([
      Type.Object({id: Type.String()}),
      Type.Object({id: Type.String(), name: Type.String()}),
      Type.Object({value: Type.Number()}),
    ])
  )

competitors.name: ajv
competitors.source:
c({anyOf: [
      {type: 'object', properties: {id: {type: 'string'}}, required: ['id']},
      {type: 'object', properties: {id: {type: 'string'}, name: {type: 'string'}}, required: ['id', 'name']},
      {type: 'object', properties: {value: {type: 'number'}}, required: ['value']},
    ]}, {invalid: [{}, {name: 'test'}, {id: 123}, {value: 'not number'}, null, undefined]})
